mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntStuTeamDAO.selectTeamList 설 명 : 팀코드 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBMSN_STSCD , ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS USER_ID , A.TEAM_ID , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(FILE_SAVENM,'.', 1)) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ) AS FILE_IDS FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.TEAM_ID = ( SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId} )
